'''Devourers''' were carnivores twisted by the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and were indigenous to [[Dxun/Legends|Dxun]]. [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]] was attacked by a devourer while trying to enter the tomb of [[Freedon Nadd]], but killed the beast. Two devourers later ate [[Mandalore the Indomitable]] after he crashed on Dxun, leaving only his mask, which was found by [[Mandalore the Ultimate]].

{{Species-stub}}
